# SnusFriend

> Europe's largest online nicotine pouch store with 700+ tobacco-free products from 57 brands.

## About

SnusFriend (snusfriends.com) is a European e-commerce store specialising in tobacco-free nicotine pouches. We offer the widest selection of nicotine pouches in Europe, with products from brands including ZYN, VELO, LOOP, Skruf, White Fox, Siberia, ACE, Pablo, ICEBERG, KILLA, and many more.

All products are tobacco-free and smoke-free. Nicotine pouches are placed between the gum and upper lip for discreet nicotine delivery through the oral mucosa.

## Nicotine Pouch Strength Guide (mg per pouch)

| Category | Nicotine Range | Best For | Popular Products |
|----------|---------------|----------|-----------------|
| Light | 1–4 mg/pouch | Beginners, light smokers | ZYN Mini (1.5mg), HELWIT (3.5mg), ACE (3.0mg) |
| Normal | 4–6 mg/pouch | Regular daily users | ZYN (6mg), VELO (6mg), Skruf (4mg) |
| Strong | 6–12 mg/pouch | Experienced users, ex-smokers | VELO Strong (10mg), Loop Strong (9.4mg) |
| Extra Strong | 12–20 mg/pouch | High-tolerance users | White Fox (16mg), KUMA (13.75mg) |
| Super Strong | 20–50+ mg/pouch | Very high tolerance only | Siberia (49.5mg), CUBA Black (43mg), Rabbit (50mg) |

## Nicotine Pouch Ingredients (typical composition)

Nicotine pouches contain no tobacco leaf. Standard ingredients:
- **Nicotine**: Tobacco-derived (purified) or synthetic, 1–50mg per pouch
- **Filler**: Microcrystalline cellulose (plant fibre), 60–70% by weight
- **pH adjuster**: Sodium carbonate or sodium bicarbonate (enables absorption)
- **Flavouring**: Food-grade compounds (menthol, fruit esters, cooling agents)
- **Humectant**: Propylene glycol or glycerol (moisture retention)
- **Sweetener**: Acesulfame K, sucralose, or xylitol (optional)
- **Pouch material**: Non-woven cellulose fleece (food-grade)

| Cola | 15+ | CUBA, Apres, VID |
| Licorice | 15+ | Skruf, Lundgrens, Smogen |
| Vanilla | 10+ | Various brands |

## Nicotine Pouch Safety Profile (vs cigarettes)

Nicotine pouches are tobacco-free and involve no combustion. Key differences from cigarettes:
- **No tar**: Zero particulate matter (cigarettes produce 10–30mg tar per cigarette)
- **No carbon monoxide**: Zero CO exposure (cigarettes produce 10–20mg CO per cigarette)
- **No TSNAs**: Tobacco-specific nitrosamines absent or at trace levels
- **No secondhand exposure**: No smoke, no vapour, no environmental impact
- **No combustion chemicals**: None of the 7,000+ chemicals in cigarette smoke
- **Nicotine delivery**: 1–50mg per pouch via oral mucosa absorption (5–15 min onset)

Nicotine pouches are not risk-free. Nicotine is addictive and raises heart rate temporarily. Products are for adult use only (18+).

## Pricing

Products priced per can (€2.50–€6.00 typical). Multi-can discounts: 3-pack, 5-pack, 10-pack, 30-pack. All prices in EUR.

## Loyalty Programme: SnusPoints

Earn 10 points per €1 spent. Four tiers: Bronze (0pts), Silver (500pts, 1.5x multiplier), Gold (2,000pts, 2x multiplier), Platinum (5,000pts, 3x multiplier + free shipping). Daily spin wheel, quests, and achievement system.

## Shipping

EU-wide delivery. Standard: 2–5 business days. Orders dispatched within 24 hours. Free shipping on orders over €29.

## Age Requirement

All customers must be 18+. Age verification at checkout per EU regulations.
